name: Asparagus Won Tons
recipeIngredient: 1 Oil for deep frying		   1/4 cup Water chestnut, finely chopped
1 Envelope veg soup mix              20 Each Won Ton wrappers (3-inch square)
1 Cup Asparagus, finely chopped           1 X Soy sauce, (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1 In an uncovered electric skillet, heat 3/4 inch of oil to 360 degrees.
2 Meanwhile, in a medium bowl, combine 1 envelope Instant Spring Vegetable Soup Mix with asparagus and water chestnuts.
3 Place 2 teaspoons of the mixture on the center of each Won Ton wrapper.
4 Moisten the corners with water, fold the wrappers in half to form a triangle, and press edges to seal.
5 Form Won Tons by bringing together two opposite points and overlapping; moisten the overlapping points and press to seal well.
6 Fry in hot oil until golden brown; drain.
7 Serve, if desired, with soy sauce.
